title: Volatile Knowledge Sidecar
description: Sidecar metadata for a volatile (working-memory) face. Each *.volatile.json accompanies a Markdown surface file.

scope.description: Axis-A: what this face is bound to

scope_ref.description: Identifier for the scope target (mission-id, project-id, tenant-slug, session-id). null for personal/global.

cadence.description: Axis-B: temporal cycle of this face

period_key.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) for daily, ISO week (YYYY-Www) for weekly. null for resident/adhoc-ttl.

tier.description: Data-tier of this face (must not be weaker than the scope's tier)

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime. Required for lifetime=session|daily|weekly|ttl. null otherwise.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of last content update

rollover_to.description: Relative path of the next-period face to roll unfinished items into

rollup_to.description: Relative path of the higher-cadence face to aggregate into at period-end

promote_target.description: Hint for the distill destination in knowledge/ (e.g. knowledge/product/governance/HINTS.md)

promotion_candidate_id.description: ID of the MemoryCandidate in the promotion queue once nominated

pinned.description: If true, treated as sticky and excluded from TTL-based GC
